_doc: World anchors consumed by scripts/worldgen/anchor_planner.gd — the
high-level layout layer (CDDA overmap specials / Veloren civ sites, scaled
down). One anchor max per zone Voronoi cell; the planner deterministically
decides per cell whether it hosts an anchor and which type, based on ring
distance from home (in zone cells, Chebyshev), the cell's biome, and a
seeded chance roll. The anchor's POI is placed in the cell's site chunk by
poi_placement.gd; pois with placement.mode 'anchor' only ever spawn this
way. Roads connect home to the nearest anchors (generation_rules.json).
ringMin/ringMax: inclusive cell-ring window. biomes: whitelist for the
cell's site biome (empty = any land). chance: per-eligible-cell roll.
teleport: reserved for future unlockable anchor teleports.
